case_title: EVANS, BERNADINE SOUTHALL VS BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY EVANS, BERNADINE SOUTHALL AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA CORPORATION BANK OF AMERICA NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
